authors.author: Jonas Myrin
Jonas Myrin
Du bist treu, treu in allem

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are forever in my life, You see me through the season; Cover me with Your hand And lead me in Your righteousness. And I look to You, And I wait on You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I sing to You, Lord, A hymn of love For Your faithfulness to me. I'm carried in everlasting arms, You'll never let me go through it all. (Hallelujah… Hallelujah)
